sqlMap.select: SELECT B.GUBUN, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM AS A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO AS B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BOARDID = ( SELECT CONNECTION_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PORTLET_ID = #portletId# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE ASC LIMIT #limit#

SELECT A.ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 , IFNULL(B.RESULT, 0) Result, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_ps_lightpollresult WHERE itemSeq = A.ITEMSEQ AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) as count FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL A LEFT JOIN TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMSEQ = B.ITEMSEQ AND USERID = #userId# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ENDDATE IS NULL AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY A.ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT result, COUNT(RESULT) AS count FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY COUNT DESC, RESULT ASC
SELECT LOGO_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LOGO_TYPE = #logoType#

SELECT comp.MENU_ID AS MENUID, name.MENU_NAME AS MENUNAME, comp.MENU_USED AS MENUUSED, comp.COMPANY_LANG AS COMPANYLANG, main.MENU_URL AS MENUURL, main.ICON_URL AS ICONURL, main.DEFAULT_ORDER AS DEFAULTORDER, user.menu_order AS MENUORDER FROM tbl_portal_menu_comp as comp JOIN tbl_portal_menu as main ON comp.MENU_ID = main.MENU_ID JOIN tbl_portal_menu_name as name ON comp.MENU_ID = name.MENU_ID AND comp.COMPANY_ID = name.COMPANY_ID AND comp.TENANT_ID = name.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth as auth ON comp.COMPANY_ID = auth.COMPANY_ID AND comp.TENANT_ID = auth.TENANT_ID AND comp.MENU_ID = auth.MENU_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_portal_menu_user as user ON comp.company_id = user.company_id AND comp.tenant_id = user.tenant_id AND comp.menu_id = user.menu_id WHERE comp.MENU_USED = 1 AND comp.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND comp.COMPANY_LANG = #langType# AND comp.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND user.user_id = #userId# ORDER BY menu_order asc, default_order asc

SELECT comp.MENU_ID AS MENUID, name.MENU_NAME AS MENUNAME, comp.MENU_USED AS MENUUSED, comp.COMPANY_LANG AS COMPANYLANG, main.MENU_URL AS MENUURL, main.ICON_URL AS ICONURL, main.DEFAULT_ORDER AS DEFAULTORDER FROM tbl_portal_menu_comp as comp JOIN tbl_portal_menu as main ON comp.MENU_ID = main.MENU_ID JOIN tbl_portal_menu_name as name ON comp.MENU_ID = name.MENU_ID AND comp.COMPANY_ID = name.COMPANY_ID AND comp.TENANT_ID = name.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_portal_menu_auth as auth ON comp.COMPANY_ID = auth.COMPANY_ID AND comp.TENANT_ID = auth.TENANT_ID AND comp.MENU_ID = auth.MENU_ID WHERE comp.MENU_USED = 1 AND comp.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND comp.COMPANY_LANG = #langType# AND comp.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_menu_user SET menu_order = #order# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND user_id = #userId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.ID, A.TITLE FROM tbl_vote_question A JOIN tbl_vote_user_and_question B ON A.ID = B.QST_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.END_DATE > date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND ( ( B.USER_ID = #userId# AND B.user_type = 'user' ) OR ( B.USER_type = 'company' AND B.USER_ID = #companyId# ) OR ( B.user_type = 'dept' AND B.USER_ID IN ( SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE (FIND_IN_SET (CN, #deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top') AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT QST_ID, VOTES_NUM, CONTENT FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qstId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TITLE, B.FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'y' ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #startRow#, #photoCount#
SELECT READ_FG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BOARDID = #boardId# AND ACCESSID = #accessId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_ORDER, B.PORTLET_NAME, C.PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND B.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PORTLET_ORDER

select.isNull: SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_ORDER, B.PORTLET_NAME, C.PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND B.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# ORDER BY A.PORTLET_ORDER
select.isNotNull: SELECT DISTINCT A.PORTLET_ID, A.DEFAULT_ORDER AS PORTLET_ORDER, B.PORTLET_NAME, A.PORTLET_URL FROM tbl_portal_portlet A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID WHERE B.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# AND B.TENANT_ID = 99 AND B.COMPANY_ID = '' ORDER BY A.DEFAULT_ORDER;

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, B.PORTLET_ORDER, C.PORTLET_NAME, A.PORTLET_URL, IF(A.PORTLET_TYPE = 'G', 1, 0) AS IS_GENERAL, A.DEFAULT_ORDER, B.PORTLET_CATEGORY, B.CONNECTION_URL, B.PORTLET_USED AS PORTLET_USED FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME C ON B.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID AND B.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID AND B.COMPANY_ID = C.COMPANY_ID AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.PORTLET_LANG = #portletLang# WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PORTLET_ID = #portletId#;
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER SET PORTLET_ORDER = #portletOrder# WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ( USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_ORDER, MENU_ID ) VALUES ( #userId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletOrder#, (SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId#) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISPLAYNAME AS USER_NAME, CN, DESCRIPTION AS DEPT_NAME, BIRTH, IF(BIRTHTYPE = 'Y', 1, 0) AS IS_SOLAR, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ( (BIRTH LIKE CONCAT('%-', #month#, '-%') AND BIRTHTYPE = 'Y') OR (BIRTH <> '' AND BIRTHTYPE = 'N') ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME AS USER_NAME, IFNULL(A.TITLE, '') AS TITLE, A.DESCRIPTION AS DEPT_NAME, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, A.CN FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE TERM = #yearAndMonth# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#

SELECT A.theme_id, A.theme_name, A.theme_content, B.theme_used, B.theme_default, C.frame_id as frame_default FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP C ON B.theme_id = C.theme_id WHERE B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.theme_used = 1 AND C.frame_default = 1

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, B.menu_url AS menuurl FROM TBL_PORTAL_STARTPAGE A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id WHERE A.user_id = #userId# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#;
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_STARTPAGE SET menu_id = #menuId# WHERE user_id = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE user_id = #userId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET used_theme = #usedTheme#, used_frame = #usedFrame# WHERE user_id = #userId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCINFO.docid, DOCINFO.docstate, DOCINFO.functiontype, DOCINFO.doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(DOCINFO.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DOCINFO.writerid, DOCINFO.writername, DOCINFO.writername2, DOCINFO.href, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptid, LINEINFO.aprmemberdeptname, LINEINFO.aprmemberid, LINEINFO.aprmembername FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.tenant_id = LINEINFO.tenant_id AND DOCINFO.companyid = LINEINFO.companid AND DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = #userId# AND DOCINFO.functiontype = '002' AND LINEINFO.aprstate = '002' AND DOCINFO.docstate not in ('015') ORDER BY DOCINFO.startdate DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT docid, docstate, functiontype, doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, writerid, writername, writername2, href FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyId# AND writerid = #userId# AND functiontype = '004' ORDER BY startdate DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DOCINFO.docid, DOCINFO.docstate, DOCINFO.functiontype, DOCINFO.doctitle, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(DOCINFO.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DOCINFO.writerid, DOCINFO.writername, DOCINFO.writername2, DOCINFO.href FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.tenant_id = LINEINFO.tenant_id AND DOCINFO.companyid = LINEINFO.companyid AND DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = #userId# AND LINEINFO.aprmembersn = 1 AND LINEINFO.aprtype <>'015' AND DOCINFO.docstate <> '017' ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT TBL_FORMINFO.* FROM TBL_FORMINFO INNER JOIN TBL_FORMUSERINFO ON TBL_FORMINFO.tenant_id = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.tenant_id AND TBL_FORMINFO.companyid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.companyid AND TBL_FORMINFO.formid = TBL_FORMUSERINFO.formid WHERE TBL_FORMUSERINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_FORMUSERINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND TBL_FORMUSERINFO.userid = #userId# ORDER BY FORMORDER LIMIT 0, 5

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -6 HOUR))=1 THEN 1 END) AS hour, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AND DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -6 HOUR) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS day, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 WEEK) AND DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 DAY) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS week, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DOCINFO.startdate >= DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH) AND DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 WEEK) > DOCINFO.STARTDATE)=1 THEN 1 END) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN (DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH) > DOCINFO.startdate)=1 THEN 1 END) AS other FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO AS DOCINFO JOIN TBL_APRLINEINFO AS LINEINFO ON DOCINFO.docid = LINEINFO.docid WHERE DOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DOCINFO.companyid = #companyId# AND LINEINFO.aprmemberid = #userId# AND DOCINFO.functiontype = '002' AND LINEINFO.aprstate = '002' AND DOCINFO.docstate not in ('015')

SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent, A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#

SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USED_THEME, B.FRAME_NAME AS USED_FRAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.USED_FRAME = B.FRAME_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT #userId# AS USER_ID, THEME_ID AS USED_THEME, (SELECT B.FRAME_NAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.FRAME_ID = B.FRAME_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.FRAME_DEFAULT = 1 AND A.THEME_ID = (SELECT THEME_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 1)) AS USED_FRAME FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND THEME_DEFAULT = 1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.TITLE, C.GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND USERID = #userId# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyId# AND A.STARTDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND S.USERID = #userId# AND S.READDATE > DATE_SUB(#nowDate#, INTERVAL 5 DAY) ) ) JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.BOARDID = C.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = C.COMPANYID ORDER BY STARTDATE LIMIT #limit#

SELECT A.TITLE, A.WRITERNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.ITEMID, A.BOARDID, B.GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #limit#

SELECT (SUBSTR(C_CLUBNAME$v_LANG$, 1, 18)) AS C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBNO, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_CLUBDESC, C_LOGO_THUMBNAIL, C_MEMBERCNT, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY C_MEMBERCNT DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT c_id, permit FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #clubNo# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT A.PORTLET_ID, A.PORTLET_CATEGORY, IF(C.PORTLET_TYPE = 'G', 1, 0) AS IS_GENERAL, A.CONNECTION_URL, A.PORTLET_ORDER, A.PORTLET_USED AS PORTLET_USED, C.MENU_ID, C.DEFAULT_ORDER, C.PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET C ON A.PORTLET_ID = C.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#;

SELECT B.PORTLET_LANG, B.PORTLET_NAME, A.PORTLET_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME B ON A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PORTLET_ID = B.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PORTLET_ID = #portletId#;
